message:
fix(upgrade): ensure self-update archive extraction works in release builds

Three issues caused `br upgrade` to fail at runtime:

1. The `signatures` feature activated zipsign-based embedded signature
   verification, but release archives are signed with minisign (external
   .minisig files), not zipsign. Passing `verifying_keys` to the updater
   triggered zipsign's verify_tar which failed on archives lacking
   embedded signatures, producing archive-related errors. Removed the
   `signatures` feature and zipsign key verification from the updater.

2. The release workflow relied on default features to include
   `self_update` (and thus `archive-tar`). Now explicitly passes
   `--features self_update` to guarantee archive extraction support
   in release binaries regardless of future default feature changes.

3. The updater's `no_confirm` was not set, defaulting to false. This
   caused the update to prompt for interactive confirmation, which fails
   in non-interactive (agent/CI) contexts. Now sets `no_confirm(true)`.

Closes #142

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
